key.name: active-mode
key.description: The id of the currently active Focus mode, or empty when Focus is off.

key.name: modes
key.description: JSON array of user-defined Focus modes: [{"id":"work","name":"Work"}].

key.name: schedules
key.description: JSON array of schedules that auto-arm a mode: [{"mode":"work","start":540,"end":1020,"weekdays":[1,2,3,4,5]}] where start/end are minutes from midnight and weekdays are 1=Mon..7=Sun.

key.name: armed-by-schedule
key.summary: Focus was armed by a schedule
key.description: Whether the active Focus mode was last armed by the scheduler rather than a manual user action.

key.name: restore-banners
key.description: Saved true/false value for org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners while Focus is active, or empty when no snapshot exists.

key.name: restore-apps
key.description: Reserved JSON array for per-application notification breakthrough restore state. The current substrate preserves the global banner setting first.
